query:
ALTER TABLE partner_expenses 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cleaningFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '保洁费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phoneFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '话费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS expressFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '快递费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS promotionFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '推广费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS partnerShare DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '合伙人承担';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute ALTER TABLE partner_expenses 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cleaningFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '保洁费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phoneFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '话费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS expressFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '快递费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS promotionFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '推广费',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS partnerShare DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '合伙人承担';
